## TRANSLATION

## “Mrs. Maria Farias Leivas, 66, married, resident of Balneário dos Prazeres (Laranjal), in Pelotas, Rio Grande do Sul, told us the following and extraordinary fact she witnessed.”

“It was about 10:00 am, on October 7th, 1973. She was alone at home, and her husband had left for work. Mrs. Maria, was frightened when she noticed strange noises inside a room in the back of her residence, as if someone was walking around there. She could clearly hear footsteps on the floor. In this place of the house, groceries are stored and there are also some objects, including sleeping hammoc
summary: A 66-year-old woman in Pelotas encountered a humanoid alien inside her home on Oct 7 1973; the being demonstrated a descending basket from an invisible craft.
